summary: WIN-010 P7 clean-external-test discriminator rewrite integrated into the same EXP as ISS-1420. Old P7 framed the 2026-08-12 test as FSF-vs-shadow-coverage, but coverage is a shared factor in both the dome formula (delta_Z = baseline × coverage × FSF) and a standard-physics prediction (≈ baseline × coverage × f(mag_lat)). New P7 defines the residual ((observed delta_Z) / (baseline × coverage)) and frames the real discriminator as geographic-latitude FSF (H(r)/r, tied to dome disc radius) vs magnetic-latitude f(mag_lat) consistent with Kim & Chang's 30°–50° response zone. The pre-registered 2026 test now has real bite. Anchor verified unique; patch lands the c6 Hole 2 recommendation expanded.
